description: Use this API to set parameters for harmonics load data user model IEEE_MEASUREMENT. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5.0. ierr = har_set_par_lodmdl_ieee_measurement(ibus,id,realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying Refer model schematic diagram in PAG Harmonics chapter for information on each real constant. (input).

realar.description: Real Constant K1 (0.073 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k1’.
Real Constant K2 (6.7 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k2’.
Real Constant K3 (0.74 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k3’.
Real Constant K4 (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k4’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: load not found.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model HTYP not allowed.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model does not take parameters.
